description_long: This is a stripped, skeletal frame of a sedan, missing all exterior panels, windows, and interior fittings. The body is composed primarily of exposed metal, with visible structural elements such as the roof supports, door frames, and floor pan. The front and rear sections are open, revealing the absence of the engine, trunk, and all mechanical components. The wheel wells are empty, and there are no doors, seats, or dashboard present. The surface appears rough and unfinished, likely due to corrosion or damage, giving the object a weathered, industrial look. The overall form is still recognizable as a sedan, with a distinct passenger compartment and trunk area.
description: A bare, weathered metal frame of a sedan with no panels, windows, or interior, exposing its structural skeleton and empty wheel wells.
description_view_0: The front and left side of the sedan frame are visible, showing the open engine bay, missing doors, and exposed cabin structure.
description_view_1: The rear and left side are shown, highlighting the empty trunk area and the absence of rear body panels and windows.
description_view_2: The rear and right side are visible, with a clear view into the trunk and passenger compartment, emphasizing the skeletal structure.
description_view_3: The front and right side are shown, displaying the open engine bay, missing doors, and the exposed floor and roof supports.
